item.title: Must Play Epic mini golf course! (Holes 5-6)
item.description: Explore holes 5–6 of an epic mini golf course at Camelot Golfland, featuring creative obstacles, skill-based putts, and fun gameplay moments.

media:content.media:title: Must Play Epic mini golf course! (Holes 5-6)
media:content.media:description: Explore holes 5–6 of an epic mini golf course at Camelot Golfland, featuring creative obstacles, skill-based putts, and fun gameplay moments.

item.title: 2 Ball Mini Golf Challenge!
item.description: Watch a unique mini golf challenge using two balls at once, featuring creative shots, tricky obstacles, and fun competitive gameplay.

item.title: The Popstroke Daytona Beach mega mini golf match! (Holes 34-37)
item.description: Watch the closing holes (34–37) of a mini golf match at Popstroke Daytona Beach, featuring high-pressure putts, tricky layouts, and exciting finishing moments.

item.title: Disney's Winter Summerland Mega Mini Golf Match! - Crazy Game!
item.description: Watch a fast-paced mini golf match at Disney’s Winter Summerland, featuring creative course designs, tricky shots, and exciting gameplay moments.

item.title: Are These The World's Biggest Mini Golf Holes?!
item.description: Explore unusually large mini golf holes and course designs, highlighting scale, creativity, and challenging putting setups.
